default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SentinelOne and growthx.ai to discuss ongoing content and SEO projects.](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SentinelOne is localizing content to 7 languages in Q3, migrating to ContentStack CMS](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [SEO audit revealed technical issues (404s, 301s, duplicate titles) to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [New CVE index page design presented; needs brand identity update and filtering options](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Content review process to be established, involving PMM team for product-specific input](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

## Topics

### Current Projects and Priorities

  - [Localizing site content to 7 languages in Q3](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Migrating to ContentStack CMS](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [SEO efforts site-wide](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)
  - [Endpoint security and cloud security are top priorities for content](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)

### SEO Audit Findings

  - [Identified 404s and 301s that need resolution](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Found pages with duplicate titles and multiple title tags/H1s](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Discovered canonicalization issues with non-SentinelOne subdomains](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [SentinelOne team already addressing some of these issues internally](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=643.0)

### CVE Index Page Design

  - [Hero design presented with brand colors, tag cloud, and search bar](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Feedback: needs updating to current brand identity (remove old line patterns)](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Suggestion to add filtering options (e.g., by technology)](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### Content Creation and Review Process

  - [Adversarial attacks article completed as part of AI cybersecurity cluster](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=825.0)
  - [Need to establish review process involving PMM team for product-specific input](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Proposal to use Airtable for automated review notifications and status updates](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)

### Blog Content Management

  - [All new topics intended for CS101 AI and data subsection](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=1170.0)
  - [SentinelOne working with another SEO agency; need to avoid duplicate work](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [Featured images on CS101 blog remain consistent, with individual blog titles changing](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)

### Scrunch Platform Access

  - [Currently internal to growthx.ai due to account restrictions](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Aida to provide insights and screenshots as Scrunch's data export is limited](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ankit to review and comment on the CVE index page design in Figma](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Aida to follow up with Mahadi on Slack regarding content review process](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Establish content review workflow involving Ankit, PMM team, and Mansi](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Aida to share Figma files and other relevant information in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [growthx.ai to continue monitoring Scrunch data and provide insights to SentinelOne team](https://fathom.video/share/LzDDJgj4W1Mp82crwv4Z6zhQmm_2yswF?tab=summary&timestamp=1464.0)

action_items.description: Review AI-generated prompts from provided topics. Share feedback/edits
Investigate sales team tools (e.g. Gong) for potential prompt sources
Review SEO audit doc. Share w/ team. Prioritize remaining 404s/301s
Add comments/feedback to CVE index page hero design in Figma. Include filtering suggestions
Review adversarial attacks blog. Provide feedback on tone, product mentions, FAQ section
Slack Mahadi re: content review process. Clarify PMM involvement, approval workflow
Involve Mansi in content review. Ensure no duplicate work btw agencies. Share CS101 guidelines
Share Figma files, other relevant info in Slack for wider team access
